textPlain: It's a touch odd to make a big deal of the fact that you've filed a complaint and fail to mention that it was formally rejected three days before you published the post: https://datatracker.ietf.org/group/iesg/appeals/artifact/146

Lots of respect to both you and the author, but the rejection gives no real response to any of the issues I see raised in the document.It failed to raise my confidence at all.> The IESG has concluded that there were no process failures by the SEC ADs. The IESG declines to directly address the complaint on the TLS WG document adoption matter. Instead, the appellant should refile their complaint with the SEC ADs in a manner which conforms to specified process.
